summary: Complete end-to-end testing of JSON comparison tool. Backend APIs working perfectly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI functional with file upload, comparison, and download features working. Tool selection and search functionality verified. Minor issue with System/Entire comparison types not showing results.

integration_issues.issue: Comparison completes but summary panel doesn't appear for these comparison types

passed_tests: JSON file upload (invalid with proper error handling)
Tools comparison type with full workflow

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (most features working, minor issues with 2 comparison types)

action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate why System and Entire Object comparison types don't display summary panels after comparison completes, though the backend API appears to be working correctly. The issue may be frontend-specific or related to how these comparison types handle empty/different data structures.
